claimText: The Blue Pinkgill Mushroom is native to New Zealand and derives its color from azulene, a pigment that is rare in fungi.
evidenceExcerpt: The Blue Pinkgill Mushroom is native to New Zealand and derives its color from the rare fungal pigment azulene.
examUse: Statement-based question on flora characteristics and pigments.

claimText: The Shuttlecock Mushroom was recently recorded in the Kawal Tiger Reserve, marking its first confirmed sighting in the Eastern Ghats.
evidenceExcerpt: The Shuttlecock Mushroom was recorded in Kawal Tiger Reserve, marking its first confirmed sighting in the Eastern Ghats.
examUse: Statement-based question on species range extensions and protected areas.
distractorHooks: First confirmed sighting in the Western Ghats
